items.title: Alliance | Dubai Economy & Tourism Corporate Event
description: We produce corporate event coverage like this for high-profile stakeholder gatherings, capturing key moments on-site and shaping them into a clean, platform-ready recap.
This film covers an Alliance event in Dubai, created around economy and tourism themes in collaboration with Dubai’s Department of Economy and Tourism, designed for a corporate audience.
Delivered as part of an event package with flexibility for shorter cutdowns and speaker-focused versions.

items.title: ADNOC Shared Services Gathering | UAE (2025)
description: We produce event coverage videos like this for corporate gatherings, capturing the energy on-site and distilling leadership messaging into clear, platform-ready edits.
This clip features moments from ADNOC’s first Shared Services gathering of the year, highlighting the team’s role through challenges and the 2025 focus areas, with AI positioned as a top priority.
Part of a multi-video event package, highlights, speaker moments, and cutdowns, created for internal and external communications.

items.title: Energy Operations Overview | ENAP in Egypt
description: A corporate overview of ENAP, Chile’s state-owned energy company, and its role across exploration and production, refining and marketing, and gas and energy, framed through its international footprint, including Egypt.

The film highlights ENAP’s work in Egypt across concessions in the Western Desert, North Sinai, and the offshore Mediterranean, including joint-venture operations and performance milestones tied to mature assets with growth potential.
It also reinforces operational values, safety-first culture, people as a core asset, and continuous improvement, alongside exploration outcomes and discoveries referenced in the timeline.

items.title: A Corporate Film | Apache Egypt
description: A corporate impact film highlighting Apache’s long-term presence in Egypt since 1996, including major investment and leadership in the country’s oil and gas sector.

The video spotlights Apache’s “Give Where We Live” commitment, supporting Egypt Vision 2030 through education, community development, and social initiatives, with a strong focus on girls’ education through the Springboard program and ongoing support for schools in rural and operational areas.
It also features broader community support, from healthcare initiatives and blood donation campaigns to orphanage support, sanitation, and scholarships for Egyptian students.

items.title: A Corporate Story | Engazat
description: A corporate documentary created for Engazat, built to present the company story through a documentary-style lens.
The film focuses on real environments, authentic moments, and a clear narrative structure that supports brand storytelling in a credible, human way.
Designed as a premium, long-form corporate asset for presentations, digital platforms, and stakeholder communications.

items.title: Corporate Content Beauty Shots | Engazat
description: A curated selection of beauty shots created as part of a corporate content project for Engazat.
The video focuses on clean, cinematic visuals, locations, atmosphere, and detail-driven moments captured to support brand storytelling and elevate the overall look and feel.
Built as a flexible visual asset for use across multiple edits, teasers, and corporate communications.

items.title: ILO x UE Documentary Film
description: We produce short documentary films like this for development programs and FMCG partners, combining interviews with real on-ground footage to communicate impact clearly and credibly.

This 3-minute film for the ILO features Upper Egypt for Food Products (UE), showcasing the farm-to-factory journey through interviews and visuals from the farms and the facilities where produce is washed, processed, and packaged.
Delivered as a concise storytelling piece for stakeholder communications, reporting, and multi-platform distribution.
